commit_message:
Run testsuite in Travis CI with docker images Run testsuite in Travis CI with docker images The main contribution in this PR is to add a Travis CI job to build GHDL and ghdlsynth-beta, and test them along with yosys by running the testsuite. The procedure is as follows:

- Periodically, docker image `ghdl/synth:yosys` is built in a Travis job from repo [ghdl/docker](https://github.com/ghdl/docker). See the corresponding [dockerfile](https://github.com/ghdl/docker/blob/master/dockerfiles/yosys)

Run testsuite in Travis CI with docker images Run testsuite in Travis CI with docker images The main contribution in this PR is to add a Travis CI job to build GHDL and ghdlsynth-beta, and test them along with yosys by running the testsuite. The procedure is as follows:

- Periodically, docker image `ghdl/synth:yosys` is built in a Travis job from repo [ghdl/docker](https://github.com/ghdl/docker). See the corresponding [dockerfile](https://github.com/ghdl/docker/blob/master/dockerfiles/yosys)
examples.patch:
@@ -16,15 +16,13 @@ ALL_LDFLAGS=$(LIBGHDL_LIB) -Wl,-rpath,$(dir $(LIBGHDL_LIB)) $(LDFLAGS)
 
 ALL_CFLAGS=-fPIC -DYOSYS_ENABLE_GHDL -I$(LIBGHDL_INC) $(CFLAGS)
 
-COMPILE=$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec --cxx
-
 all: ghdl.$(SOEXT)
 
 ghdl.$(SOEXT): ghdl.o
-	$(COMPILE) -o $@ -shared $< $(ALL_LDFLAGS) --ldflags --ldlibs
+	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --build $@ $< -shared $(ALL_LDFLAGS)
 
-ghdl.o: ghdl/ghdl.cc
-	$(COMPILE) -c --cxxflags -o $@ $< $(ALL_CFLAGS)
+ghdl.o: src/ghdl.cc
+	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec --cxx -c --cxxflags -o $@ $< $(ALL_CFLAGS)
 
 clean: force
 	$(RM) -f ghdl.$(SOEXT) ghdl.o
examples.before_code:
# Build ghdl module for yosys

# Name or path to the ghdl executable.
GHDL=ghdl

YOSYS_CONFIG=yosys-config
SOEXT=so

LDFLAGS=
CFLAGS=-O

LIBGHDL_LIB:=$(shell $(GHDL) --libghdl-library-path)
LIBGHDL_INC:=$(shell $(GHDL) --libghdl-include-dir)

ALL_LDFLAGS=$(LIBGHDL_LIB) -Wl,-rpath,$(dir $(LIBGHDL_LIB)) $(LDFLAGS)

ALL_CFLAGS=-fPIC -DYOSYS_ENABLE_GHDL -I$(LIBGHDL_INC) $(CFLAGS)

COMPILE=$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec --cxx

all: ghdl.$(SOEXT)

ghdl.$(SOEXT): ghdl.o
	$(COMPILE) -o $@ -shared $< $(ALL_LDFLAGS) --ldflags --ldlibs

ghdl.o: ghdl/ghdl.cc
	$(COMPILE) -c --cxxflags -o $@ $< $(ALL_CFLAGS)

clean: force
	$(RM) -f ghdl.$(SOEXT) ghdl.o

install: ghdl.$(SOEXT)
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec mkdir -p --datdir/plugins
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec cp $< --datdir/plugins

force:
examples.after_code:
# Build ghdl module for yosys

# Name or path to the ghdl executable.
GHDL=ghdl

YOSYS_CONFIG=yosys-config
SOEXT=so

LDFLAGS=
CFLAGS=-O

LIBGHDL_LIB:=$(shell $(GHDL) --libghdl-library-path)
LIBGHDL_INC:=$(shell $(GHDL) --libghdl-include-dir)

ALL_LDFLAGS=$(LIBGHDL_LIB) -Wl,-rpath,$(dir $(LIBGHDL_LIB)) $(LDFLAGS)

ALL_CFLAGS=-fPIC -DYOSYS_ENABLE_GHDL -I$(LIBGHDL_INC) $(CFLAGS)

all: ghdl.$(SOEXT)

ghdl.$(SOEXT): ghdl.o
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --build $@ $< -shared $(ALL_LDFLAGS)

ghdl.o: src/ghdl.cc
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec --cxx -c --cxxflags -o $@ $< $(ALL_CFLAGS)

clean: force
	$(RM) -f ghdl.$(SOEXT) ghdl.o

install: ghdl.$(SOEXT)
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec mkdir -p --datdir/plugins
	$(YOSYS_CONFIG) --exec cp $< --datdir/plugins

force:
